title: Salty Silky Snapper Toast
description: A savory and silky brunch dish featuring snapper fish atop toasted bread, perfect for those on a low FODMAP diet.
instructions: Slice the Snapper Fish Fillets into thin pieces.
Toast the Whole Wheat Toast until lightly golden brown. Season with a pinch of salt and pepper.
In a small bowl, mix together Dijon Mustard and grated Parmesan Cheese to create a creamy sauce.
Arrange each slice of Toast on a plate or serving dish.
Place fish pieces evenly over toast slices.
Pour the mustard-cheese mixture over the top of the fish.
Sprinkle fresh herbs (chives and parsley) over the entire dish for added freshness.
Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-15 minutes or until the cheese is golden and bubbly on top.
Remove from the oven, let it cool slightly before serving.
